# Snov.io — Capability Profile

## Use Case Coverage

| Use Case | Rating | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| [[prospecting]] | ✓ | 50M+ profiles, domain search, bulk email finder, LinkedIn extension, Email Finder API |
| [[email-verification]] | ✓ | 7-tier check, 98% accuracy, catch-all, greylisting bypass, spam trap, 100K/file bulk |
| [[email-warmup]] | ✓ | Automated warm-up all plans; premium pool on Pro S; template warm-up; inbox placement test |
| [[personalisation]] | ✓ | AI email writer, Persona-driven builder, spintax, dynamic tags, fallback |
| [[campaign-sequence]] | ✓ | Multi-step sequences, email + LinkedIn multichannel, A/B up to 15 variants, conditional branching |
| [[inbox-reply-management]] | ✓ | Unibox pulls all account replies; sentiment analysis; engagement notifications |

## Vendor Type
Full-stack: prospecting → verification → warm-up → personalisation → sequencing → inbox. Single subscription.

## Best For
Teams wanting one tool to do everything without stitching multiple subscriptions together. Best value when you need email finding, verification, warm-up, and outreach in one place.

## Limitations
- A/B testing capped at 15 variants (vs. 26 for Instantly/Saleshandy)
- No native LinkedIn automation in sequences on lower tiers
- Warm-up premium pool only on Pro S ($99/mo+)
- Database smaller than Apollo (50M vs. 450M+)
